item.title: He Haocong
item.text: He Haocong is a fourth year computer science student at NUS. He likes to work on coding projects and eat different kinds of food in his spare time.

item.title: Sal Amarasinghe
item.text:
Sal is an engineering exchange student from Canada. Only here for four months, he's had a great time learning about UI development.

In his spare time, he likes to travel, watch TV and play soccer.

He is also going to be very sad when he leaves Singapore in 3 weeks so feel free to give him a hug.

item.title: iPhone 4S
item.text:
This is an iPhone 4S, which is a touchscreen-based smartphone developed by Apple Inc. It is the fifth generation of the iPhone, succeeding the iPhone 4, and was announced on October 4, 2011.

The cost of the iPhone 4S is currently sitting at S$350.00.

Click here to buy<\a>

item.title: Chua Chong Yun
item.text: Yume is a third year computer science student. In her spare time she likes to go to cosplay events and dress up as her favourite cosplay characters.
